description_long: This is a rectangular, countertop microwave oven with a sleek black exterior. The front features a large, dark-tinted glass door occupying most of the surface, with a vertical metallic handle on the right side for easy opening. Adjacent to the handle is a control panel, which includes a digital display and a grid of tactile buttons arranged in a neat pattern. The top, sides, and back are solid black with no visible features, giving the appliance a minimalist and modern appearance. The microwave is likely constructed from a combination of metal and plastic, with a glass window for viewing the interior. No visible branding or decorative elements are present, emphasizing its utilitarian design.
description: A modern black microwave with a large glass door, metallic handle, and a side control panel featuring a digital display and buttons. The design is minimalist with smooth, featureless sides and top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large glass door, vertical metallic handle, and the control panel with display and buttons on the right.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, solid black surface with no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless, solid black back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a plain, solid black surface.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the right side of the front face, featuring a digital display at the top and a grid of six tactile buttons arranged in two columns below. The buttons are evenly spaced and likely correspond to common microwave functions. No dials or touchpads are visible, and there is no apparent labeling.
attribute_door_handle_design: The door handle is a vertical metallic bar positioned on the right edge of the door, extending nearly the full height of the door. It is cylindrical, smooth, and slightly protrudes for easy gripping, with a polished finish that contrasts with the matte black door.
attribute_vent_placement: No visible vents or ventilation openings are present on any of the visible surfaces.
attribute_window_presence: A large, dark-tinted rectangular window is present on the front door, occupying most of the door's surface and allowing visibility into the microwave's interior.
